recommendations.title: Playing for Keeps
recommendations.overview: A former sports star who's fallen on hard times starts coaching his son's soccer team in an attempt to get his life together.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: Charlie Countryman
recommendations.overview: A young American falls hard for a Romanian cellist whose father has recently died -- and whose violent past could bring about his own demise.

recommendations.title: Air Bud: World Pup
recommendations.overview: In this second heartwarming and hilarious sequel to the popular favorite, Air Bud masters two new starring roles: soccer player and fatherhood. Loaded with laughs and cool soccer action, Buddy teams up alongside U.S. women's soccer greats.

recommendations.title: A Mighty Team
recommendations.overview: Sadoun is France’s best soccer player whose extra-curriculum pleasures are damaging his play and new contract negotiations. Dispatched by his scheming agent to his home village, he ends up reconciling with his father, relating to his fatherless niece

recommendations.title: 3 Generations
recommendations.overview: A teenager transitions from female to male, and his family must come to terms with that fact.

recommendations.title: D.E.B.S.
recommendations.overview: The star of a team of teenage crime fighters falls for the alluring villainess she must bring to justice.

recommendations.title: Inazuma Eleven the Movie: The Ultimate Force, Team Ogre, Attacks!
recommendations.overview: An organization in the future sends the specially trained Team Ogre to defeat Endou Mamoru and his team, to prevent him from influencing the world with his soccer.

recommendations.title: Next Goal Wins
recommendations.overview: Dutch coach Thomas Rongen attempts the nearly impossible task of turning the American Samoa soccer team from perennial losers into winners.

recommendations.title: Ana e Vitória
recommendations.overview: Two girls have a chance encounter and instantly befriend. While trying to find themselves, they decide to pursue music together.
